title: Arhul (disambiguation)
content:
'''Arhul''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] name. In [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]], it was of [[Brentaalan]] origin and became popular after it appeared as the alias of [[Sival Brentioch]] in ''[[The Kallea Cycle]]''. It could refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Arhul Corubalni]]''', [[scout]] in the [[Galactic Republic]]'s [[Republic Scout Service|Scout Service]] who wrote the initial survey log for the [[planet]] [[Vandor]].
*'''[[Arhul Hextrophon]]''', [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel]] [[officer]] and namesake of the [[Hextrophon Collection]].
**'''[[Arhul Hextrophon School of Embedded Journalism]]''', school located on [[Lerct]] attended by [[Beaumont Kin]].
*'''[[Arhul Nemo]]''', a [[lieutenant]] in the [[Commenor Underground]].
*'''[[Arhul Narra]]''', commander of [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)|Red Squadron]].

==Legends==
*'''[[Sival Brentioch]]''', who went under the alias of '''Arhul Habea'''.
*'''[[Arhul Crace]]''', a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] in the [[Stormtrooper Corps/Legends|Stormtrooper Corps]].
*'''[[Arhul Hextrophon/Legends|Arhul Hextrophon]]''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] and [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] historian.
*'''[[Arhul Holt]]''', an officer in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] who later defected.
*'''[[Arhul Kurumenga]]''', a [[General/Legends|general]] in the [[Imperial Department of Military Research/Legends|Imperial Department of Military Research]].
*'''[[Arhul Manaxa]]''', scholar emeritus at the [[University of Rudrig/Legends|University of Rudrig]].
*'''[[Arhul Narra/Legends|Arhul Narra]]''', commander of [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]].
{{Disambig}}
